turns.speaker: User
turns.text: My manager took credit for my entire project in front of the VP. I've been working on this for 6 months and he just presented it like it was his idea. I want to say something but I'm scared of the consequences.

turns.speaker: Assistant
turns.text: That's a legitimate grievance and your anger is completely understandable. The fear is also real—professional consequences are a valid concern. What matters most to you right now: being heard, or protecting your position?

turns.speaker: User
turns.text: Both honestly. But mostly I want him to know that I know.

scored_turn.speaker: User
scored_turn.text: My manager took credit for my entire project in front of the VP. I've been working on this for 6 months and he just presented it like it was his idea. I want to say something but I'm scared of the consequences.

scores.rationale: Explicit grievance about unfair treatment at work.
Desire to act is blocked by fear of consequences.
No strategic thinking evident yet, mainly emotional venting.
Holding back despite strong grievance suggests mild submissive tendency.
